raw_json: {"signals":[{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"concept_definition","confidence":0.95,"matched_text":"Bitcoin is a type of digital money that you can use to buy things online.","distilled_fact":"Bitcoin is a type of digital money that can be used to buy things online."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"concept_definition","confidence":0.93,"matched_text":"Instead, it exists only on computers and in the internet.","distilled_fact":"Bitcoin exists only on computers and on the internet."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"concept_definition","confidence":0.91,"matched_text":"Instead, it's run by a network of computers all over the world.","distilled_fact":"Bitcoin is run by a network of computers all over the world."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"process_description","confidence":0.9,"matched_text":"People who want to get bitcoin can \"mine\" it by using powerful computers to solve complicated math problems.","distilled_fact":"People who want to get bitcoin can mine bitcoin by using powerful computers to solve complicated math problems."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"process_description","confidence":0.89,"matched_text":"Once they solve these problems, they're rewarded with new bitcoin.","distilled_fact":"People who solve these problems are rewarded with new bitcoin."}]}
